## Scope

- [ ] Runtime behavior
- [ ] Workflow DSL or public package API
- [ ] Connector contracts
- [ ] Scenario or example
- [ ] Documentation or release metadata
- [ ] Tests only

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run ci`
- [ ] `npm run scenario:maintenance`
- [ ] `npm run test:llm`
- [ ] Not run, reason:

## Notes

- Public API changes are reflected in `../docs/API.md`.
- Package tarball changes are inspected with `npm run pack:check`.
- LLM-dependent behavior changes explain whether real-provider smoke testing was run.
